issue_title: RDS Enhanced monitoring wrong link in step
issue_body_preview:
## Documentation Page
https://docs.datadoghq.com/integrations/amazon_rds/#create-your-kms-key

## Issue Description
Under step 1
Link for kms should be https://console.aws.amazon.com/kms/home instead of 
https://console.aws.amazon.com/iam/home#encryptionKeys

## Expected
> 1- Open the AWS K
test_description_zh: 访问 Datadog 文档中 Amazon RDS 集成页面的 'Create your KMS key' 部分，检查步骤1中关于 KMS 的外部链接地址是否正确指向 AWS KMS 控制台。
expected_result_zh: 步骤1中的 KMS 链接应指向 https://console.aws.amazon.com/kms/home，而非旧的 IAM encryptionKeys 页面地址。
